creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
Can not build, the fetch of dist file returns a webpage saying the
	account is not available.  So, checksum test fails.

	New site http://www.kornelix.com/fotoxx has links to 13.01.2,
	13.02.1 and 13.03.1, no luck trying to get 11.03 from the path.

Fix: 

Guess this port needs to get updated to current release?
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to build...
